nasb.text: Even jackals offer the breast, They nurse their young; But the daughter of my people has become cruel Like ostriches in the wilderness.

esv.text: Even jackals offer the breast; they nurse their young; but the daughter of my people has become cruel, like the ostriches in the wilderness.

cnv.text: 野狗尚且用乳房哺養牠們的幼兒； 但我的眾民變得多麼殘忍，像曠野的鴕鳥一樣。

ccb.text: 豺狼尚且哺养自己的幼儿， 我的子民却像荒野的鸵鸟一样残忍无情。
